metadata.title: Apple Books Notes Sync
metadata.description: Apple Books Notes Sync Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder inside the current vault where generated notes and assets are written.
ast.target: 当前保险库内用于写入生成笔记和资源的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create the Obsidian Bases view for synced book notes.
ast.target: 为同步的书籍笔记创建 Obsidian Bases 视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required full path to absync. Use Detect to find and save it automatically.
ast.target: absync 的完整路径。使用“检测”自动查找并保存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether PDF annotations are synced and which renderer is used for PDF page images.
ast.target: 控制是否同步 PDF 注解以及使用哪个渲染器来处理 PDF 页面图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: App used when opening a PDF page link from generated notes.
ast.target: 从生成的笔记中打开 PDF 页面链接时使用的应用程序。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: missing PDF path.
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：缺少 PDF 路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: PDF link points to an invalid file path.
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：PDF 链接指向无效的文件路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: detecting absync CLI...
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：正在检测 absync CLI...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: another absync command is still running.
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：另一个 absync 命令仍在运行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: command details copied.
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：命令详情已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: install command copied.
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：安装命令已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: path command copied.
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：路径命令已复制。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Apple Books Notes Sync: CLI setup
ast.target: Apple Books 笔记同步：CLI 设置
